topic: Governing Equations - Conservation Laws for CFD
template_rationale: Theory-heavy topic requiring mathematical derivations from first principles

parts.title: Core Theory - Conservation Laws
parts.guideline: Start with basic concepts, build to full derivations. Begin with integral forms, derive differential forms. Show complete mathematical steps with explanations.

parts.title: Physical Challenge - Why These Equations Matter
parts.guideline: Show practical problems: pressure-velocity coupling, phase change effects, nonlinear convection. Connect math to real CFD solver behavior.
key_challenges: Density ratio effects in two-phase flow
Expansion term necessity for phase change ⭐

parts.title: Architecture & Implementation
parts.guideline: Show Mermaid class diagrams BEFORE code. Explain OpenFOAM operator implementations. Include file paths and line numbers for all verified code.

parts.title: Quality Assurance - Verification Exercises
parts.guideline: Provide 6+ concept check questions with detailed solutions. Include code verification exercises that reference actual source files.

foundation_importance: All subsequent days build on these equations
learning_outcomes: Derive conservation equations from integral to differential form
Understand the expansion term necessity for phase change
Navigate OpenFOAM finite volume class hierarchy
Identify where equations appear in source code

connections_to_future_days.connection: Gauss divergence theorem converts integral forms to FVM
Expansion term derived from continuity equation

r410a_relevance.pressure_divergence_risk: Without expansion term, pressure equation becomes singular during evaporation
r410a_relevance.energy_coupling: Latent heat hfg ≈ 200 kJ/kg for R410A

progressive_overload_notes.part_1_progression: Add dimensions, go from integral → differential
progressive_overload_notes.part_2_shift: Now consider solver difficulties with these equations
progressive_overload_notes.part_3_shift: Examine how OpenFOAM implements these equations
progressive_overload_notes.part_4_shift: Verify understanding through exercises and code verification
